name: Chocolate Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients by hand with a spatula until well-blended.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely before cutting into squares.
5. To make the icing, combine sugar, butter, and milk in a saucepan.
6. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it reaches a boil.
7. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from the heat.
8. Stir in the chocolate chips until they are fully melted.
9. Pour the icing over the cooled cake and spread evenly.
